current_regime.label: Bull Low Vol
current_regime.description: Equity markets are trending steadily higher into mid-2026, supported by resilient corporate earnings, moderating inflation, and a cautiously accommodative Federal Reserve stance following its gradual rate normalization cycle. Implied volatility measures remain suppressed, with the VIX trading in the low-to-mid teens, reflecting broad investor complacency and steady institutional inflows into risk assets.
current_regime.guidance: Strategies that work well include trend-following long equity exposure, covered call writing to enhance yield on existing positions, selling volatility premium via cash-secured puts, and momentum-based factor investing. Avoid strategies that rely on volatility spikes such as long straddles or tail-risk hedges, as well as overly defensive positioning in cash or inverse ETFs that will drag on returns in a persistently low-volatility uptrend.

history.label: Bull Low Vol
history.description: Equity markets are trending higher with subdued volatility as investor sentiment remains constructive, supported by stable monetary policy expectations and resilient corporate earnings. Breadth is healthy with modest but consistent upside momentum across major indices.
history.guidance: Strategies that work well include long equity exposure, covered calls, short put spreads, and trend-following approaches; avoid long volatility plays, inverse ETFs, and aggressive hedging positions that bleed premium in a low-vol grind higher.
